title: Kerala CM oath-taking highlights: VD Satheesan becomes new chief minister as LDF's 10-year rule comes to end
description: Kerala CM oath-taking highlights: VD Satheesan took oath as the new chief minister of Kerala as the state sees a change in government after 10 years of Left rule. Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge as well as Rahul and Priyanka Gandhi among attendees for the swearing-in ceremony.
